user_request: how would u add teh embedding to the planner agent

todos.title: Analyze existing planner agent
todos.description: Review planner.py, prompts.py, and schema.py to understand the current functionality and identify suitable locations for embedding integration.

todos.title: Determine embedding usage
todos.description: Decide how embeddings will be used within the planner agent (e.g., for context understanding, decision-making, etc.).

todos.title: Update schema
todos.description: Modify schema.py in the planner directory to include new fields or methods related to embedding usage.

todos.title: Integrate embedding manager
todos.description: Import the vector_store module from core/embeddings and integrate it into planner.py to utilize embeddings.

todos.title: Test embedding integration
todos.description: Run tests to ensure that the embedding integration does not break existing functionality and that new features work as expected.
